title: cyphomandra adenotricha
intro: Cyphomandra adenotricha, also known as the tree tomato or tamarillo, is a type of fruit-bearing shrub native to the Andean region of South America. The medicinal properties of Cyphomandra adenotricha include its high antioxidant content, anti-inflammatory properties, and ability to lower blood pressure. The health benefits of consuming the fruit or using the plant's extracts include reducing the risk of heart disease, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Cyphomandra adenotricha, such as teas, capsules, and tinctures, are commonly used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
